sidebar.title: Catalog

catalog.emptyDefault: No products for this region yet.
catalog.emptyCategoryMissing: Category not found or products are not in this category.
catalog.emptyCategory: No products in «{name}» yet. In the admin open the product → Categories and add this category, or pick another category in the menu.
